name: Tenda 2K WiFi 6 Indoor Security Camera
description:
The Tenda 2K WiFi 6 Indoor Security Camera helps you monitor your home with a 3 MP sensor that captures clear video throughout the day. Its PT design allows flexible viewing, while 10X digital zoom lets you take a closer look at specific areas without moving the camera.

AI detection can identify people and send real-time alerts, while pet and baby crying detection helps you stay informed when you're away. It also supports One-Touch Calling, WiFi 6 connectivity, and local recording on a TF card up to 256GB for convenient indoor monitoring.

✔️ 3 MP sensor with 2K video recording
✔️ AI human, pet, and baby crying detection
✔️ One-Touch Calling with real-time alerts
✔️ WiFi 6 and 2.4GHz wireless connectivity
✔️ Supports up to 256GB TF card storage
